title: lasianthus stercorarius
intro: Lasianthus stercorarius, a species of flowering plant in the heath family, is native to India and Southeast Asia and is also known as the "Cow Dung Bush". This plant has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antibacterial and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Lasianthus stercorarius include its ability to support digestion and relieve symptoms of diarrhea, as well as its potential to aid in the treatment of fever and skin conditions. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used in combination with other herbs to enhance their medicinal properties.
